title: chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. norsemanense
intro: Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. norsemanense, also known as Norseman yellow buttons, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe and protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation. The health benefits of Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. norsemanense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
